value.found_quote: Claude Code exports metrics as time series data via the standard metrics protocol, events via the logs/events protocol, and optionally distributed traces via the [traces protocol](#traces-beta).
value.rationale: The page describes Claude Code exporting events via the logs/events protocol through OpenTelemetry. It documents log events for prompts (user_prompt events, OTEL_LOG_USER_PROMPTS), API requests/responses (api_request_body / api_response_body log events), and tool details/results, matching the claimed structured records. The feature is presented as generally available, with traces being the only beta-marked component.
